title: KP:1 signatures.yaml Schema
description: JSON Schema for the signatures.yaml integrity manifest in a KP:1 knowledge pack. Aligned with ARCHIVE.md §4 (v0.7.3+).

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm. Currently only SHA-256 (future-proofed for upgrades).

pack_id.description: Stable pack identity across versions. OPTIONAL in the schema for backward compatibility with pre-documentation archives; new archives SHOULD include it.

pack_name.description: Optional self-describing pack name (equal to PACK.yaml name). Enables receipts and relay indexing without a second file read.

pack_version.description: Optional self-describing pack version (equal to PACK.yaml version). Enables receipts without a second file read.

pack_hash.description: Pack content hash computed per ARCHIVE.md §3 (lowercase hex SHA-256 digest, 64 characters).

files.description: Map of NFC-normalized relative file paths (with / separator) to their lowercase hex SHA-256 digests. MUST NOT include signatures.yaml itself.

sealed_by.description: Identifier of the sealing system (e.g., capture-client, analysis-service).

version.description: Parent pack's version string from its PACK.yaml.

parent.description: Parent version reference. Absent for v1 of a pack; present for v2 and later.

value.description: Base64-encoded (standard, padded) signature over the signing payload defined in ARCHIVE.md §4.2.

key_id.description: Opaque key identifier for locating the verification key.

signature.description: Optional digital signature. When present, all three sub-fields are REQUIRED.
